lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible signs of wear, including some fading and minor stains on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear but no major damage. The interior is well-maintained with some signs of normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is in great shape overall, with only a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver’s side seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has received regular oil changes and recent brake service. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. This is a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention from its next owner. The engine is currently difficult to start and suffers from a rough idle once running, suggesting underlying fuel or ignition issues. The transmission is also showing signs of severe wear, with noticeable slipping and delayed engagement in several gears. On the exterior, there is visible rust along the wheel wells and several significant dents on the body panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would best serve as a project vehicle or a source for parts.

Step into a reliable and stylish ride with this fantastic car! It is in good condition, showing it has been well-maintained and is ready for many more miles. With its solid performance and clean appearance, this vehicle is a dependable choice that you can drive with confidence!

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a pristine state, exhibiting no discernible wear and adhering to the most stringent maintenance protocols. Its flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity define the pinnacle of the pre-owned market. We invite the most discerning buyers to secure this showroom-quality acquisition.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s in flawless condition! I’ve babied this car from day one—spotless interior, gleaming paint, and it drives like a dream. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Shoot me a message if you want to take a look!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in impeccable condition. This chassis features the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, meticulously maintained with a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and rod bearing replacement for long-term mechanical integrity. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, ensuring structural rigidity under high-lateral loads. Every component, from the bushings to the individual throttle bodies, functions with factory-spec precision. This is a rare, turn-key example for the discerning collector who demands peak atmospheric performance and zero deferred maintenance.
Used car. Mint condition. Clean title. No accidents. Fully serviced.

Offering an absolute showroom-quality specimen that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, further enhanced by a multi-layer ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and matte, the controls show no signs of use, and it still carries a faint new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified specialists. This vehicle has never seen rain, has no modifications, and represents a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example of automotive engineering.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an exhaustive maintenance history. Every aesthetic and mechanical detail meets the highest standards of excellence, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. An exemplary acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in exemplary showroom condition. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to confirm its mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection. Characterized by its flawless exterior and an interior entirely devoid of wear, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands unrivaled quality and performance.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she's a total gem. This car is in pristine, showroom-ready condition—spotless inside and out! It's been babied since day one and drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that looks and feels brand new, you've definitely found it. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54 inline-six powerplant. This example features a factory-spec high-pressure double VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band and razor-sharp throttle response. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a precision-tuned limited-slip differential. Finished in its original paint with a factory-correct interior, the mechanical integrity is verified by a comprehensive service history, including preventative rod bearing replacement. A true turn-key specimen for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom condition. Every inch of the original factory paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free from swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a complete, documented service history and strictly garage-kept under a soft cover. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the dealership. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking absolute perfection.

Presenting a masterfully preserved vehicle that transcends the standard expectations of pre-owned luxury. This specimen remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original factory delivery state. For the discerning enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. Every component has been meticulously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for mechanical and aesthetic excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in automotive quality and presentation.

Oh man, you are going to love this ride! It’s seriously in showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one. It’s super clean inside and out, runs perfectly, and honestly feels brand new. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner will be thrilled!

Presenting a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) finished in Carbon Black. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with six individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated dual-VANOS system for optimal torque across the powerband. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. Mechanically flawless, this vehicle has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod bearing service using VAC Motorsports components. The chassis retains its factory-spec kinematic integrity, offering razor-sharp turn-in and zero bushing deflection. A concourse-level example for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional ceramic coating, with absolutely no chips, dents, or scratches to be found. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the leather remains supple and matte, the original floor mats are pristine, and it has strictly been a smoke-free, pet-free environment. Under the hood, the engine bay is remarkably clean, backed by a complete, meticulously documented service history from an authorized dealer. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions perfectly, providing a tight, quiet, and powerful driving experience. This is a rare, collector-grade example that must be seen in person to be fully appreciated.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class. This specimen remains in impeccable, showroom-original condition, having been curated with meticulous attention to detail. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, offering a definitive ownership experience for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting immaculate interior surfaces and a flawless exterior finish. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished pedigree and pristine mechanical integrity.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been babied since day one and is in absolutely pristine, showroom-ready condition. No scratches, no smells, just pure driving bliss. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

Offering a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example boasts a meticulously maintained VANOS system, reinforced rear subframe, and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The engine exhibits optimal compression across all cylinders, and the limited-slip differential provides exceptional torque distribution. The exterior retains factory paint depth with zero evidence of oxidation, while the cabin features Nappa leather with no bolster wear or UV damage. Recent service includes a full cooling system overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative peace of mind. A true collector-grade specimen with surgical mechanical precision.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This vehicle is the definition of a time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections, and has been kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in a preserved state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and matte, showing no signs of wear or creasing, and it still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history with every maintenance milestone performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships. The engine delivery is smooth and whisper-quiet, paired with a transmission that shifts seamlessly. For the collector or discerning enthusiast who demands perfection, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

Presented for the discerning collector, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence in its purest form. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains a showroom luster while the interior remains indistinguishable from new. This is an investment-grade example, offering a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unrivaled mechanical and aesthetic integrity.
